queries.question: List all directors and also list producers who won an Oscar.
queries.sql:
SELECT Director.name
FROM Director
UNION
SELECT Producer.name
FROM Producer
WHERE Producer.Award = "Oscar"

queries.question: Provide all directors and producers who won an Oscar.
queries.sql:
SELECT Director.name
FROM Director
WHERE Director.Award = "Oscar"
UNION
SELECT Producer.name
FROM Producer
WHERE Producer.Award = "Oscar"

ambiguous_dsl.question: Provide all directors and producers who won an Oscar.
